issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

不过这些截图说明了什么问题吗？看起来没有意义。

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Issue URL (Ads)
[https://payorweeathim.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpayorweeathim.com%2F)

> Domain squatters with link tracking, redirects through ads, and finally "invisible" affiliate link redirects.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.wunderground.com/dashboard/pws/IKROUN1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wunderground.com%2Fdashboard%2Fpws%2FIKROUN1)

### Comment
> Hello,
> 
> I would like to report a possible false positive or filtering issue with AdGuard DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com).
> 
> When AdGuard DNS is enabled on Android devices, Personal Weather Station (PWS) pages on Weather Underground do not load correctly.
> 
> What I tested:
> 
> Android phones with AdGuard DNS configured as Private DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> Multiple browsers (Chrome and Opera)
> Multiple devices (the issue occurs on more than one Android phone)
> Clearing browser cache and site data did not resolve the issue
> 
> Observed behavior:
> 
> With AdGuard DNS enabled, station pages may either:
> display the station as Offline with no weather data shown, or
> redirect to a 404 Not Found page.
> 
> With AdGuard DNS disabled, the same station pages load correctly and weather data is displayed.
> With AdGuard DNS enabled but traffic routed through a VPN, the same station pages also load correctly.
> 
> The issue appears consistently on multiple devices using AdGuard DNS and disappears immediately when AdGuard DNS is disabled or bypassed through a VPN.
> 
> This suggests that a domain required by Weather Underground may be blocked or filtered by AdGuard DNS.
> 
> Thank you for investigating.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/d904cbqzqc084oc088sg8kok4cco8w0ivt2646w9kg.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8aan3xf8e6ck8oc8o8ssoc8s0oo0cgooiqtwpclkfk.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS

Browser: | Opera

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.sooplive.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.sooplive.com%2F) ### Comment > 한국에서 주로 서비스하는 스트리밍 사이트인 SOOP (https://www.sooplive.com/)에서 > 실시간 스트리밍 재생 시 저화질(540P) 재생시에는 이상이 없으나 > 고화질(720P, 1080P) 재생시에는 해당 사이트의 전용 프로그램 SOOP Package 을 설치해서 실행해야지만 재생이 가능한데 크롬에서 재생중 중간중간에 버퍼링(로딩 중)이 심합니다. > 크롬에서 adguard 브라우저 어시스턴트 > 이 웹사이트에서 활성화됨 을 해제하면 약간 나아지기는 하지만 여전히 버퍼링이 심하고 > 윈도우 작업표시줄 숨겨진아이콘에서 실행중인 Adguard 우클릭하여 보호끄기 또는 Adguard 종료 를 하면 soop 고화질 재생이 전혀 문제 없이 잘 재생됩니다. > > 위에 말한 SOOP Package 프로그램이 Adguard에서 충돌이 발생하는것 같아서 > Adguard > 설정 > 일반 설정 > 고급 설정 > 응용 프로그램 필터링 예외 설정 > C:\Users\사용자계정\AppData\Local\SOOP (SOOP Package 실행파일이 있는 경로) 를 추가해봐도 문제는 여전히 발생합니다. > > ``` Username: @hsc0shysh ``` ### Screenshots

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.sooplive.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.sooplive.com%2F) ### Comment > 한국에서 주로 서비스하는 스트리밍 사이트인 SOOP (https://www.sooplive.com/)에서 > 실시간 스트리밍 재생 시 저화질(540P) 재생시에는 이상이 없으나 > 고화질(720P, 1080P) 재생시에는 해당 사이트의 전용 프로그램 SOOP Package 을 설치해서 실행해야지만 재생이 가능한데 크롬에서 재생중 중간중간에 버퍼링(로딩 중)이 심합니다. > 크롬에서 adguard 브라우저 어시스턴트 > 이 웹사이트에서 활성화됨 을 해제하면 약간 나아지기는 하지만 여전히 버퍼링이 심하고 > 윈도우 작업표시줄 숨겨진아이콘에서 실행중인 Adguard 우클릭하여 보호끄기 또는 Adguard 종료 를 하면 soop 고화질 재생이 전혀 문제 없이 잘 재생됩니다. > > 위에 말한 SOOP Package 프로그램이 Adguard에서 충돌이 발생하는것 같아서 > Adguard > 설정 > 일반 설정 > 고급 설정 > 응용 프로그램 필터링 예외 설정 > C:\Users\사용자계정\AppData\Local\SOOP (SOOP Package 실행파일이 있는 경로) 를 추가해봐도 문제는 여전히 발생합니다. > > ``` Username: @hsc0shysh ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/inzs4j45hzc448440800s044gcs4gw867unoa0rzn4.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/m5ynifv251c08scskk8s8oogo0wog0s1ks8p6ge3py.png?nc=1)

issue.title: map.naver.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://map.naver.com/p?c=15.00,0,0,0,adh&p=G8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg,161.84,10,90,0,0,Float](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmap.naver.com%2Fp%3Fc%3D15.00%2C0%2C0%2C0%2Cadh%26p%3DG8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg%2C161.84%2C10%2C90%2C0%2C0%2CFloat) ### Comment > 언제부턴가 해당 확장프로그렘이 켜져있을때 > 네이버지도에서 로드뷰를 보려고하면 화면이 멈추고 스크린샷과같이 오류가 뜹니다. > 사이트를 새로고침하거나 해당 프로그램을 비활성화를 하면 정상작동됩니다. > > 처음에는 로드뷰를 쓰기 어려울만큼 버벅임과 로드뷰 화질저화등이 발생했는데 > 이 확장프로그램에서 몇가지 설정 변경 후 화질개선과 버벅거림은 없어졌지만 > 첫 실행시 오류가 뜨는건 바뀌지않아요. > 네이버지도 로드뷰 관련 프로그램을 차단하는거같은데 수정부탁드립니다. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/nbbifrcvywgsks80s44cwo804sc0gcwcu7ttg67gbk.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/li7hxnx6q1skcck4s8kkk0wcwkg044wctxta2icodw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.49 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

**Language-specific:**
List-KR Filters last update: | 2026-06-09T08:01:29Z ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.49&system_version=Windows+11&ext.manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&regular_filters=2%2C3%2C10%2C11%2C227&filters_last_update=2026-06-09T08%3A01%3A29Z&stealth.enabled=0)

comment.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.index.hr/mobile](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.index.hr%2Fmobile) ### Comment > previously all the ads have been removed after loading the page but in the recent times that's not the case. I see both ads on the main page and on the specific news. It seems that like ads are coming from Google ads. When I tried to block the element it gets blocked but when I refresh the page again it doesn't get removed. I see the entry on the blocked elements list for this page, but it's always the same. comment.body:
It's caused by this rule:
```adblock
cda.pl##.row-video-clip-wrapper
```
from `Dandelion Sprout's Annoyances List`:
https://github.com/DandelionSprout/adfilt/blob/826c0f23200701e6a4be313212ac3bc331f548ed/AdRemovalListForUnusualAds.txt#L45
Temporary solution:
```adblock
cda.pl#@#.row-video-clip-wrapper
```

@DandelionSprout Could you please take a look?

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/aw/ybh?ref_=navm_ftr_ybh](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.amazon.co.jp%2Fgp%2Faw%2Fybh%3Fref_%3Dnavm_ftr_ybh) ### Comment > 4月ごろからChromeでアマゾン閲覧履歴をスクロールしていくと > 表示がかなり遅くなり「ページが応答しません」の表示が出て止まることがある。 > adguardの設定を同じにしてEdgeで使用すると問題なく素早く表示されます。 > Chromeでadguardをオフにすると素早く表示されます。 > ### Screenshots

**Language-specific:**

comment.body:
Though I can't reproduce the described issue itself, I see relatively high CPU usage on the page with Base filter enabled. I guessed it'd due to scriptlet filters for Prime video, but adding exceptions for all the scriptlet rules doesn't work, while totally disabling Base works.
[Update] I'm not sure why, but it seems adding `@@||amazon.co.jp^$generichide` mitigates the high-CPU usage.

comment.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://dodopizza.ru/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fdodopizza.ru%2F) ### Comment > Tracking issue, NOT ads. Sorry for misleading tag, but there is no option for tracking. If I should report it to another repo, let me know please. > > > Dodo websites (both desktop and mobile) use tracking endpoint, which is on `https://dodopizza.ru/api/v1/bridge/v2/tracking_b?\apiUserName=*&tid=*&sessionId=*` address now. > > Rules like `||dodopizza.ru/api/v*/bridge/v*/tracking*` resolve this issue in full, not breaking anything. ``` Username: @georgij-spiridonov ``` ### Screenshots

issue.title: Submit phishing websites disguised as the ToDesk, Huorong and WPS official website
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

Search "ToDesk" with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`cn-todesks.com.cn` (as `www.cn-todesks.com.cn`)
`work-todesk.com.cn`
`todesk.cn.com`
`h-todesk.com.cn`
`pc-todesktk.com.cn` (as `www.pc-todesktk.com.cn`)
`of-todesk.com`
`todisk-app.com.cn`
`win-todesk.com.cn`

Search "火绒" (Huorong in Chinese, an antivirus software) with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`pc-huorong.com.cn`
`ch-huorong.cn`
`huorong-sf.com.cn`
`zh-huorong.com.cn`
`huorong-pc.com.cn`
`win-huorong.com.cn`
`huorongapp.com.cn`

Search "WPS" with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`wps-wpspc.com`
(other WPS phishing sites already blocked by `-wps.com.cn^`)

These phishing websites have done SEO, so they are easy to find on Bing search and rank higher than the real official websites.
Official PC site of ToDesk is `www.todesk.com`, official Chinese-language site of Huorong is `www.huorong.cn`, official Chinese-language site of WPS Office is `www.wps.cn` (`www.wps.com` for international).
These phishing websites may check referer and reject access from anywhere else than search engines.

### Proposed solution

Ban these phishing websites.

### Additional information

_No response_

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
